assumptions: The developer has an email address or a qualifying GitHub or Google account.
The developer does not yet have a Capella organization or free tier operational cluster.
Only one free tier operational cluster is available per organization.

developer_goal: Create a Capella account, deploy a free tier operational cluster, and run Couchbase's documented first SQL++ query against travel-sample.

first_success.outcome: The free tier cluster's travel-sample data answers the official first SQL++ query.
first_success.observable_signal: After Enter or Run, Capella displays the query results in JSON format.

route_selection.rule: Start at Capella account creation, prefer the no-cost free tier operational cluster, then end at the explicitly named first Query-tab SQL++ procedure.

candidates.name: Email signup, Getting Started free cluster, first SQL++ query
candidates.reason: Email fields and the manual free-cluster form are documented, but GitHub and Google are peer signup methods and Capella also recommends Guided Setup for new users.

candidates.name: Email signup then Guided Setup with App Services
candidates.reason: Official docs recommend Guided Setup for new users; it adds App Services and sample import while still producing an operational cluster with sample data.

candidates.name: Documents viewer edit of airport_1261
candidates.reason: Same page offers this as an alternate data exercise; the page separately names Run Your First Query as the SQL++ procedure.

candidates.name: Paid operational cluster or SDK connection
candidates.reason: Paid path adds billing and support configuration; SDK path adds credentials, IP allowlist, and client install after first query.

required_path.action: Create a Capella account using email, GitHub, or Google.

required_fields.label: Signup method
required_fields.notes: Email, GitHub, and Google are peer options.

required_fields.label: Password
required_fields.notes: At least 12 characters with upper, lower, number, and special character on the email route.

required_fields.label: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy agreement

required_path.observable_result: Capella creates the account and an organization with default project My First Project.

required_path.action: Deploy the free tier operational cluster using Getting Started or Guided Setup.

required_fields.label: Setup method
required_fields.notes: Guided Setup is recommended for new users; Getting Started is the manual free-cluster form.

required_path.observable_result: A free tier operational cluster exists with travel-sample available for Data Tools.

required_path.action: Open Query, paste the documented SQL++ statement, and press Enter or Run.
required_path.observable_result: Query results display in JSON format.

prerequisites.description: Organization Owner or Project Creator permission is required to create or turn on an operational cluster.
GitHub signup requires a verified public primary email before Capella accepts that branch.

external_gates.description: Account creation requires agreement to Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Email signup requires retrieving a confirmation code from outside Capella.

unavoidable_waits.description: Couchbase must deliver the email confirmation code on the email signup route.
Free tier cluster deployment must finish before Query tools can run against travel-sample; exact readiness label and duration are not published on the free-tier guide.

platform_outcomes.description: Capella creates the organization and default My First Project after account creation.
A free tier operational cluster includes the travel-sample bucket for Data Tools.

excluded.reason: Documented as optional during Create Account.

excluded.item: Build Suggested index and iQ Insights after the first query
excluded.reason: Presented after the first-query JSON result.

excluded.item: SDK connection, credentials, and IP allowlisting
excluded.reason: Listed after first query in Capella get-started flow.

sources.title: Create an Account and Deploy Your Free Tier Operational Cluster
Explore Sample Data with Data Tools
Connect To Your Cluster
evidence_supported: SDK and credential path ordered after first-query style exploration

uncertainties.question: Should the measured Capella route use email, GitHub, or Google signup?
uncertainties.impact: Signup method changes required fields, GitHub email-public prerequisites, confirmation-code waits, and external OAuth steps.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account walkthroughs of all three methods through the first authenticated Capella home screen.

uncertainties.question: Is Guided Setup or Getting Started the selected free-tier deployment route for first SQL++ success?
uncertainties.impact: Guided Setup is recommended for new users but adds App Services; Getting Started is shorter for database-only first query but may differ in sample-data timing.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Apply lexicographic selection after fixing signup, or capture both flows' action lists to the same Query-tab JSON result.
